Schedule read

Pile delivery is the immediate mechanical control point.

Audelio Zuniga's May 30 field update clarifies that Zones B, D, F, and G cannot start until the remaining 50% of piles begins arriving on June 8. The dashboard now treats inventory and zone assignment as the mechanical schedule driver.
